foundersHero.title: Frontiers Event
foundersHero.subtitleHighlight: You — the early contributors, creators, and visionaries —
foundersHero.subtitleDimmed: form the heart of Nasun's community.
foundersHero.description1: As one of the first to join our journey, you help shape the foundation on which Nasun's vision will grow.
foundersHero.description2: The Nasun Frontiers Event recognizes your early participation and grants exclusive access, privileges, and eligibility across the Nasun ecosystem.
foundersHero.visionDescription1: Each piece was inspired by the sci-fi world-building of our first IP—Gen Sol, and was crafted using tools like Blender, ZBrush, Substance Painter, and Photoshop.
foundersHero.visionDescription2: Owning one means joining us beyond the boundaries of art, finance, and technology—where our imagination fuels our journey into a future without limits.
foundersHero.ctaButton: JOIN THE WHITELIST & START YOUR JOURNEY WITH US >>

nsnToken.label: NSN Token
nsnToken.description: be eligible to claim NSN Tokens upon the launch of the mainnet. Utility of NSN Tokens include: governance, payment for network usage, and staking for network security.

genSolToken.label: GEN SOL Token
genSolToken.description: be eligible to claim GEN SOL tokens (TBD) to participate in the governance and creative development of Nasun's first flagship IP, Gen Sol.

tiersOfRarity.label: 4 Tiers of Rarity
tiersOfRarity.description: 4 Frontiers NFTs + Battalion NFT + Early Contributors NFT (6 NFTs per wallet) will be recognized for participation and multipliers. Quantity and rarity will signal the power of each wallet.

first.label: First
first.description: unlock early participation to prototypes, closed testing environments, and creative collaboration programs.

directCommunication.label: Direct Communication
directCommunication.description: gain entry to private channels where holders can contribute ideas and feedback to shape the ecosystem across platforms.

vip.label: VIP
vip.description: invitations to premieres, showcases, and select community or industry events.

whitelists.label: Whitelists
whitelists.description: enjoy priority access for future programs, including the Nasun Seed Sale and partner initiatives.

title: FRONTIERS COLLECTION
tagline: Ascend through the ranks of the Ark universe. Higher tiers unlock unprecedented access in our space opera saga.

toast.unsupported_chain: This chain is not supported yet.

message.unsupported_chain: The selected network is not currently supported.
